title: CeraLive Image Board Manifest
description: Board-tier manifest. Captures the per-board attributes that vary within a family (board id, DTB, overlays, quirks). A board inherits every family-tier attribute from the family it references. Adding a new board = author one of these files + (if needed) a family file; no script edits.

family.description: Filename stem of the family manifest this board inherits (e.g. 'rk3588' -> families/rk3588.yaml; 'x86_64' -> families/x86_64.yaml). REQUIRED — the board pulls arch, branch, kernel/uboot/dtb/firmware packages, bootloader adapter and partition template from the referenced family. Underscores are permitted so arch-named family stems (x86_64) match their filename verbatim.

board_id.description: Armbian BOARD= value for the Armbian BSP build framework (legacy userpatches BOARD=). e.g. 'rock-5b-plus', 'orangepi5-plus'. Also covers ARMBIAN_BOARD/DEVICE_CODE.

dtb_name.description: Device-tree blob filename for this board (e.g. 'rk3588-rock-5b-plus.dtb'). Maps to DTB_FILE in configs/devices/*.conf. Use the literal 'none' on x86/ACPI boards that have no device tree.

armbian_overlays.description: Board-specific device-tree overlays applied at build time (e.g. rk3588-hdmi-input, rk3588-m2-modem-42mm). Optional. Maps to DT_OVERLAYS in configs/devices/*.conf. Overlay names are lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens (the Armbian overlay-file stem convention).

uboot_packages.description: Per-board U-Boot package override. Optional. When present it REPLACES the family-tier uboot_packages (deep-merge: board arrays win wholesale). rk3588 U-Boot is board-specific (linux-u-boot-rock-5b-plus-vendor vs linux-u-boot-orangepi5plus-vendor), so the family declares uboot_packages:[] and each board names its own here. Items must be valid Debian package names.

quirks.description: Free-form board-specific flags for known hardware workarounds (e.g. M2_MODEM_SIM_WORKAROUND, hdmi_input_emi_shield). Optional. Values restricted to scalars so the builder can shell-export them. Absorbs the HARDWARE_WORKAROUNDS / M2_MODEM_* / EMI_RESISTANCE descriptive flags from configs/devices/*.conf.

layout_overrides.description: Per-board overrides of the family partition_template. Optional and free-form. Sizes/roles remain bounded by the FROZEN partition contract; this exists only for narrow board-specific deviations (rare).

single_slot_fallback.description: When true, this board provisions the single-slot fallback layout (no A/B redundancy) for storage below the 16 GB threshold (partition-contract §4/§5). Optional; provisioning normally auto-detects by medium size, so this is an explicit force.

app_backend.description: How the first-party app components ship on this board. 'sysext' = ceracoder/srtla binaries via systemd-sysext into /usr/bin; 'appfs' = CeraUI-style heavier payload via the base/app image. Default 'sysext' (decision: sysext boundary).

description.description: Human-readable board name/notes (e.g. DEVICE_NAME 'Radxa Rock 5B+'). REQUIRED — single home for the descriptive INSTALLATION_NOTES/hardware-spec metadata that is not consumed by the builder.
